title: Cofradia Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Cofradia with a Z-Score of +4.86. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Cofradia is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 16.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 47%, and wind speed is moderate at 10.2 km/h. 
 These conditions are resulting in severe heat stress, with no cooling degree days (HDD=0.0 GG) expected.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
